divulgation.title: Education
divulgation.description: We support Bitcoin-related educational activities and cultural events.

adoption.title: Adoption
adoption.description: We help businesses with the correct use and custody of Bitcoin.

promotion.title: Promotion
promotion.description: We aggregate all Bitcoin-related businesses and initiatives in Turin.

connection.title: Networking
connection.description: We foster collaborations between industry entities and city institutions.

TorinoBitcoinCity.description: We imagine a future where Bitcoin becomes a cornerstone of Turin's economy, leveraging its engineering and entrepreneurial tradition. We are building the foundations and connections to make it happen.

NextEvent.title: Next Event
NextEvent.description: Challenge other Turin design students in promoting Bitcoin through products, services, and communication campaigns. Create high-impact projects and enrich your portfolio.

Partners.title: Partners
Partners.becomePartner: Want to become a partner of the association?

Footer.description: Association dedicated to the promotion and development of the Bitcoin ecosystem in Turin.
Footer.newsletterDesc: Stay updated on events and news.

Ecosystem.title: Ecosystem
Ecosystem.description: Explore the Bitcoin ecosystem in Turin: meetups, businesses, merchants, and spaces that accept Bitcoin

people.title: People
people.description: Active Bitcoin communities and groups in Turin and Piedmont.

activities.title: Merchants
activities.description: Shops and businesses that accept Bitcoin.

spaces.title: Spaces
spaces.description: Bitcoin-friendly locations and coworking spaces in Turin.

Ecosystem.ctaTitle: Want to be part of the ecosystem?
Ecosystem.ctaDescription: If you manage a community, a business, or a space and want to be included in our map of the Turin Bitcoin ecosystem, contact us!

Meetup.title: Meet other Bitcoiners
Meetup.ctaTitle: Want to create a new community?
Meetup.ctaDescription: If you are thinking of starting a new Bitcoin community in Turin or Piedmont, we can help you promote it and put you in touch with other organizers.

bitpolito.name: BitPolito
bitpolito.description: Student team from the Polytechnic of Turin focused on education and development of Bitcoin, bridging university and industry.

satoshi_torino.name: Satoshi Spritz Torino
satoshi_torino.description: The largest Italian Bitcoin meetup, meets every Thursday to host short talks, film forums, book clubs and encourage networking.

satoshi_bardonecchia.name: Satoshi Spritz Bardonecchia
satoshi_bardonecchia.description: Meetup with irregular frequency that brings together Bitcoin enthusiasts in Bardonecchia and surrounding areas.

satoshi_valsusa.name: Satoshi Spritz Val Susa
satoshi_valsusa.description: Meetup with irregular frequency that brings together Bitcoin enthusiasts throughout Val di Susa.

bitcoin_alba.name: Bitcoin Alba-Asti-Cuneo
bitcoin_alba.description: Meetup with irregular frequency that brings together Bitcoin enthusiasts in the area of Alba, Asti and Cuneo.

bitdevs.name: BitDevs
bitdevs.description: Global network of Bitcoin developers focused on advanced technical discussions, mainly on the latest news in the industry.

bitcoin_bitches.name: BitcoinBitches
bitcoin_bitches.description: Italian community, with a strong presence in Turin, which aggregates girls of all ages passionate about Bitcoin.

Spaces.title: Build with other Bitcoiners
Spaces.ctaDescription: If you manage a coworking space, an event location, or a space that could host the Turin Bitcoin community, let's talk!

blox.name: Blox Space
blox.description: Multifunctional space in the center of Turin designed for freelancers and startups active in the world of Bitcoin and freedom technology.

polito.name: Polytechnic of Turin
polito.description: The prestigious university hosts several Bitcoin-related initiatives, such as the Master on Bitcoin and Lightning Network, the Bitcoin Observatory, and the student team BitPolito.

planb.name: Plan B
planb.description: Informal venue in downtown Turin with a Bitcoin-themed setup that combines a café by day and a cocktail bar in the evening.

Companies.title: Companies
Companies.description: Businesses and startups using Bitcoin and Lightning Network in Turin
Companies.ctaDescription: Join the Turin Bitcoin ecosystem and be part of the network of innovative companies building the future of the economy.

company1.name: Bitcoin Company 1
company1.description: Description of the company and its use of Bitcoin

company2.name: Bitcoin Company 2
company2.description: Description of the company and its use of Bitcoin

startup1.name: Bitcoin Startup 1
startup1.description: Description of the startup and its project

Merchant.title: Businesses
Merchant.description: Shops and commercial activities that accept Bitcoin in Turin
Merchant.ctaTitle: Do you accept Bitcoin in your business?
Merchant.ctaDescription: Become part of Turin's Bitcoin-friendly business network and reach a community of passionate customers and innovators.

bar.name: Bitcoin Bar
bar.description: Coffee, breakfast and appetizers payable in Bitcoin and Lightning

FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.description: Find answers to the most common questions about Bitcoin Torino
FAQ.ctaTitle: Didn't find the answer you were looking for?
FAQ.ctaDescription: Contact us directly or join our Telegram group to ask your questions to the community.
